name: Man out of Time
description: A resource-rich world, poised to become a vital foothold in the Persean Sector. Surveys highlight immense potential, making it a prime target for ambitious colonization efforts.
author: Cryosleeper Status Log: Eon Horizon Preservation Report 472-A

name: Man out of Time
description: The ability to analyze and exploit a vessel’s weak points is essential to securing victory, where raw firepower alone falls short. Only a keen mind can turn structural flaws into decisive advantages.
author: "Engagement Tactics": VI Battlegroup Tactical Oversight Division
